name: read_pasoe_configuration
description: Reads the full PASOE configuration. Returns environment info (DLC, PROPATH, paths), all key config files (openedge.properties, server.xml, catalina.properties, jvm.options, WEB-INF openedge.properties) and file listings of conf and logs directories.

instance.description: PASOE instance name. Defaults to oepas1.

section.description: Section to return: all | environment | config | disk. Defaults to all.
